title: Allies Join the Rescue
description: The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Chopper. The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Those jerks...!! I won't forgive them!

summary: The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.
